zh.lifeSummary: 當Maddalena Visconti於1361年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾時，她的父親Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy38歲，母親Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan30歲。她於1381年9月2日與Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1404年7月17日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫文德爾斯巴賀波豪奧森享年43歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 阿爾額廷波豪奧森萊特哈斯拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maddalena Visconti于1361年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾时，她的父亲Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy38岁，母亲Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan30岁。她于1381年9月2日与Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1404年7月17日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫文德爾斯巴賀波豪奧森享年43岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 阿爾額廷波豪奧森萊特哈斯拉。

nameMeanings.name: Visconti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

nameMeanings.name: Maddalena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Maddalena Visconti was born in 1361, in Milan, Lombardy, Italy, her father, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, was 38 and her mother, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, was 30. She married Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach on 2 September 1381. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 17 July 1404, in Burghausen, Windelsbach, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 43, and was buried in Raitenhaslach, Burghausen, Altötting, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maddalena Visconti est née en 1361, à Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach le 2 septembre 1381. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 juillet 1404, à Burghausen, Windelsbach, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Raitenhaslach, Burghausen, Landkreis Altötting, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maddalena Visconti 1361 in Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy 38 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan 30. Sie hat am 2. September 1381 Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Juli 1404 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Burghausen, Windelsbach, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Raitenhaslach, Burghausen, Landkreis Altötting, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maddalena Visconti è nata il nel 1361 nel Milano, Lombardia, Italia, sua padre, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach il 2 settembre 1381. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 luglio 1404, nel Burghausen, Windelsbach, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Raitenhaslach, Burghausen, Landkreis Altötting, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Maddalena Viscontiが1361年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノで生まれた時，父Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardyは38歳，母Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milanは30歳であった。1381年9月2日にFrederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1404年7月17日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチウィンデルスバチブルガウセンで43歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アルトoッティングブルガウセンレイテンハスラチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maddalena Visconti(이)가 1361년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1381년 9월 2일 Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1404년 7월 17일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 윈델스바치 버그하우센에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 알트o틴그 버그하우센 레이텐하슬라치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maddalena Visconti nasceu em 1361, em Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach em 2 de setembro de 1381. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de julho de 1404, em Burghausen, Windelsbach, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Raitenhaslach, Burghausen, Landkreis Altötting, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maddalena Visconti родилась в 1361 г. в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия, её отцу по имени Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach 2 сентября 1381 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 17 июля 1404 г. в местности бургаусен, винделсбач, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности реитенаслач, бургаусен, ландкрис алтoттинг, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maddalena Visconti nació en 1361, en Milano, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach el 2 de septiembre de 1381. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de julio de 1404, en Burghausen, Windelsbach, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Raitenhaslach, Burghausen, Landkreis Altötting, Bayern, Alemania.
